strategy_groups.selection_reason: 20 unique marine/island tile designs with 6 chapter color variants each. Hand-drawn watercolor style (128×128px, 8px bleed, 24px corner radius, paper texture overlay 6%) is too style-specific for any existing asset pack. Google Imagen 4 (primary) + OpenRouter GPT-Image (fallback) available via MCP.
strategy_groups.quality_requirements: 128×128px PNG; 8px transparent bleed; 24px corner radius; chapter palette compliance; saturation 20-88% per stage; grayscale-distinguishable
strategy_groups.adaptation_requirements: Apply chapter palette crossfade per variant (ch1-ch6); pack per-chapter into tiles_ch{N}_atlas
strategy_groups.handoff_requirements: PNG per chapter variant; chapter atlas JSON (tiles_ch1_atlas through tiles_ch6_atlas)

strategy_groups.selection_reason: 5 custom tactical special-block types with unique color identity (#7ECDE8, #F0C4C4, #F5A840, #F5C842, #4A7D55) and 12-frame animation strips. Game-mechanic-specific designs (light_wave = silver-blue tuna ripple, light_chain = rainbow fish, pierce = pufferfish burst, swap = firefly lantern, cascade = moss vine) cannot be sourced from generic packs.
strategy_groups.quality_requirements: 12-frame animation strip at 30fps; 128×128px per frame; special block atlas separate from chapter atlases
strategy_groups.adaptation_requirements: Generate full 12-frame strip per block type; slice into atlas frames; pack into special_blocks_atlas

strategy_groups.selection_reason: 7 custom project-specific characters with unique designs, chibi 1:1.5 head-body ratio, watercolor style, distinct signature colors, and DragonBones skeletal animation rig requirements. Style specificity precludes any existing character pack. LLM generates layered base art; manual DragonBones rigging completes skeletal animation.
strategy_groups.quality_requirements: 256×512px base canvas (char_gicho 192×192px); DragonBones-compatible layer decomposition; unique single-color silhouette readable at any resolution; watercolor hand-drawn style
strategy_groups.adaptation_requirements: Decompose generated image into DragonBones bone layers (head, torso, arms, legs, accessories); rig in DragonBones Pro; export idle/happy/surprised/sad/wave animations
strategy_groups.handoff_requirements: PNG layer sheets per character + DragonBones .dbproj file + animation export JSON

strategy_groups.selection_reason: 18 project-specific backgrounds (6 chapters × 3 restoration states: before/in_progress/restored). Exact chapter palette progressions and saturation restoration storytelling unique to Glow Island. 1920×1080px JPG format for web-canvas-2d platform.
strategy_groups.quality_requirements: 1920×1080px JPG; chapter-palette compliant; saturation stage compliance (s0-s4); 3-state progressive restoration visual
strategy_groups.adaptation_requirements: Generate 'before' state first; derive 'in_progress' and 'restored' by saturation increase; apply chapter primary_hue
strategy_groups.handoff_requirements: JPG per state per chapter (18 files total)

strategy_groups.selection_reason: Project-specific UI with wood-sign aesthetic (flat+soft-shadow, #E8D8B4 wood, #8B6030 border, pill-shape buttons 24px corners). Island palette and healing philosophy cannot be matched by generic mobile UI packs.
strategy_groups.quality_requirements: PNG; wood-sign UI style; island palette (#F7EDD8, #E8866A, #F5C842); button 3-state variants; atlas-packable for ui_elements_atlas
strategy_groups.adaptation_requirements: Generate base state; derive pressed (darken 15%) and disabled (desaturate 50%) states for buttons; pack all into ui_elements_atlas
strategy_groups.handoff_requirements: PNG sprites per state + ui_elements_atlas JSON

strategy_groups.selection_reason: Project-specific VFX tied to mechanics (combo burst, match disappear, chapter restore). Must match healing aesthetic (no excessive particle debris, warm palette #F5C842, prohibited: neon/harsh tones). Generic VFX packs are typically too intense for healing aesthetic.
strategy_groups.quality_requirements: PNG frame strips; vfx_atlas max 1024px; warm palette compliance; healing aesthetic (4-6 particles per tile, not excessive)
strategy_groups.adaptation_requirements: Generate frame sheets; slice to individual frames; pack into vfx_atlas

strategy_groups.selection_reason: Narrative props deeply tied to character identity (ひなた's notebook with custom symbol system, lighthouse lamp as story climax object). Style-specific and story-critical; cannot be sourced generically.
strategy_groups.quality_requirements: PNG; style-consistent with character and environment art; prop_lighthouse_lamp requires 8-frame animation strip
strategy_groups.adaptation_requirements: For prop_lighthouse_lamp: generate frame strip and slice for atlas. For prop_notebook: generate open/closed variants
strategy_groups.handoff_requirements: PNG variants; prop_lighthouse_lamp frame strip + atlas reference

global_strategy_summary.rationale: All 70 assets are project-specific with high style specificity (hand-drawn watercolor, healing aesthetic, custom character designs, specific palettes and measurements). No suitable licensed source packs exist that match the required style. LLM image generation with project-specific prompts is the correct strategy for all asset groups.
global_strategy_summary.license_policy: All assets project_owned — no third-party license review required
